title: Kif Gets Knocked Up A Notch

jokes.text: Schman! The great rad spot is mega-Sweet for party boarding.
jokes.setup: Character expressing enthusiasm about boarding activity
jokes.punchline: Amy's Valley Girl slang mixed with futuristic terms creates absurd dialogue
jokes.explanation: Good character voice work mixing Valley Girl speak with sci-fi terms, establishes Amy's personality

jokes.text: Another hour and I would've thought of hanging up.
jokes.setup: Kif has been waiting on the phone for a long time
jokes.punchline: His extreme patience and politeness makes him consider hanging up only after an additional hour
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing Kif's excessive politeness and patience, well-structured understatement

jokes.text: It's not my fault if you don't check me. Messages erased.
jokes.setup: Kif complains about not getting messages
jokes.punchline: Bender reveals he's been deleting messages and shows no remorse
jokes.explanation: Classic Bender selfishness and casual cruelty, good character integration

jokes.text: Messages erased.
jokes.setup: Just admitted it wasn't his fault messages weren't getting through
jokes.punchline: Immediately erases more messages while they're talking about it
jokes.explanation: Beautiful escalation - Bender making the problem worse while they're discussing it. Perfect timing and economy.

jokes.text: When even an inch separates us, I quiver with misery.
jokes.setup: Kif expressing his romantic longing
jokes.punchline: His extreme sensitivity makes even tiny distances unbearable
jokes.explanation: Good character work showing Kif's over-the-top romantic nature

jokes.text: So you can imagine how I feel when it's a billion light years.
jokes.setup: Following his complaint about inches of separation
jokes.punchline: The astronomical scale makes his sensitivity absurd
jokes.explanation: Good escalation from the previous joke, effective use of sci-fi scale for comedy

jokes.text: Kif, don't cry, or you'll get a tummy ache.
jokes.setup: Kif is being overly emotional and romantic
jokes.punchline: Amy treats him like a child with childish concerns
jokes.explanation: Shows the mismatch in emotional maturity between the characters

jokes.text: Lieutenant, some things came off me and clogged the drain, so if you can-- Oh-Ho. What's this?
jokes.setup: Zapp starting to ask Kif for help with a disgusting personal problem
jokes.punchline: He gets distracted mid-sentence by something more interesting
jokes.explanation: Classic Zapp grossness and self-absorption, good character moment

jokes.text: Well, well, well. Do my eyes believe me, or is that my bosomy swan, Leela?
jokes.setup: Zapp seeing Leela on the viewscreen
jokes.punchline: His creepy, inappropriate romantic language
jokes.explanation: Good Zapp characterization with his awful pickup lines

jokes.text: You could drop me off on the way. We could, but we won't!
jokes.setup: Amy makes reasonable request to be dropped off
jokes.punchline: Professor's unnecessarily harsh refusal
jokes.explanation: Good Professor crankiness, economical setup and punchline

jokes.text: It's a spaceship, damn it, not a prom limousine! Ooh! If anyone needs me, I'll be in the angry dome.
jokes.setup: Professor's angry refusal to help Amy
jokes.punchline: He storms off to his 'angry dome'
jokes.explanation: Creative visual gag concept with the 'angry dome,' very quotable and character-specific

jokes.text: I don't even breathe oxygen.
jokes.setup: Everyone needs to go into hibernation to save oxygen
jokes.punchline: Bender points out he doesn't need oxygen anyway
jokes.explanation: Good Bender logic, pointing out the obvious robot difference

jokes.text: They jumped right out of their pants.
jokes.setup: Amy arriving at the ship unexpectedly
jokes.punchline: Literal description of surprised crew members
jokes.explanation: Simple visual gag, not particularly creative

jokes.text: Kif, I'm sensing a very sensual disturbance in the Force. Prepare for ship-to-ship intimacy.
jokes.setup: Zapp noticing Amy's arrival
jokes.punchline: Star Wars reference mixed with his inappropriate sexual commentary
jokes.explanation: Good Zapp characterization with pop culture reference twist

jokes.text: Imagine you stowing away and stealing a licensed starship. Oh, it's so romantic it gives me the shivers.
jokes.setup: Kif describing Amy's illegal actions
jokes.punchline: Amy finds criminal behavior romantic
jokes.explanation: Shows Amy's twisted values and romantic priorities

jokes.text: You can use the floor and I'll have the ceiling. See?
jokes.setup: Kif showing how they could share his tiny quarters
jokes.punchline: Visual of Kif demonstrating ceiling living
jokes.explanation: Good visual gag showing Kif's optimistic problem-solving

jokes.text: And nothing can hurt you, except when it malfunctions... And the holograms become real. Well, that probably won't happen this time.
jokes.setup: Kif explaining holodeck safety
jokes.punchline: Immediately mentioning the dangerous malfunction that will obviously happen
jokes.explanation: Classic foreshadowing joke that sets up later chaos, well-structured

jokes.text: Four million lines of BASIC.
jokes.setup: Kif proudly showing off the programmed pony
jokes.punchline: He used an outdated, primitive programming language for something complex
jokes.explanation: Great nerd humor showing Kif's earnest but inefficient approach

jokes.text: And I would pluck the moon from the sky just to see you smile. Almost got it. Seems to be sort of stuck.
jokes.setup: Kif making grandiose romantic gesture
jokes.punchline: He literally tries to grab the moon and fails
jokes.explanation: Excellent literalization of romantic cliche, great character moment

jokes.text: Run program Kif-Colon-Slash-Slash-Three!
jokes.setup: Kif naming his holographic programs
jokes.punchline: He literally includes programming syntax in the voice command
jokes.explanation: Good nerd humor showing Kif's literal programming mindset

jokes.text: Amy, we could live in a bus station bathroom for all I care. As long as we're together, it'll feel like a castle to me.
jokes.setup: Kif expressing his devotion to Amy
jokes.punchline: He chooses the most unromantic possible location to make his point
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Kif's romantic devotion via gross contrast

jokes.text: Evil Lincoln! Right-O, gents. It's another simulation gone mad. So murder and mayhem, standard procedure.
jokes.setup: Historical villains have escaped the holodeck
jokes.punchline: Evil Lincoln politely organizes the chaos
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist concept - Evil Lincoln maintaining presidential dignity while organizing villainy

jokes.text: Damn! The last time that happened, I got slapped with three paternity suits.
jokes.setup: Zapp reacting to holographic characters becoming real
jokes.punchline: He reveals he's had inappropriate relationships with holograms before
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zapp characterization - inappropriate sexual behavior in any situation

jokes.text: Stop! No shoot fire-stick in space canoe! Cause explosive decompression! Spare me your space-age techno-babble, Attila the Hun.
jokes.setup: Attila warning about shooting in space
jokes.punchline: Zapp dismisses accurate safety advice as 'techno-babble'
jokes.explanation: Clever reversal - ancient Hun understands space better than space captain

jokes.text: After all that, I could use some relaxation. I'll be in the Holo-Shed.
jokes.setup: They just escaped dangerous holographic villains
jokes.punchline: Zapp immediately goes back to the dangerous holodeck
jokes.explanation: Good irony showing Zapp's complete inability to learn from experience

jokes.text: After all that, I could use some relaxation. I'll be in the Holo-Shed.
jokes.setup: They just escaped a deadly holodeck malfunction
jokes.punchline: Zapp immediately wants to go back to the same dangerous device that nearly killed them
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zapp stupidity - learning nothing from near-death experience. Good ironic structure.

jokes.text: Oh, and Kif is pregnant.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg listing various injuries from the incident
jokes.punchline: Casually mentions the impossible pregnancy as an afterthought
jokes.explanation: Perfect comedic timing - burying the biggest news as casual medical observation

jokes.text: And not one of those bogus everyday miracles, like a sunrise.
jokes.setup: Amy calling the pregnancy a miracle
jokes.punchline: Bender dismissively compares it to sunrises
jokes.explanation: Good Bender cynicism about natural beauty and wonder

jokes.text: Just when I thought I'd figured out you biological creatures, it's something else!
jokes.setup: Bender's confusion about biological reproduction
jokes.punchline: His frustrated attempt to understand organic life
jokes.explanation: Good robot perspective on biological mysteries

jokes.text: So, Kif, pray explain, and don't spare the dirty words where appropriate.
jokes.setup: Professor asking for biological explanation
jokes.punchline: His inappropriately eager request for explicit details
jokes.explanation: Good Professor perversion disguised as scientific curiosity

jokes.text: You disgust me. Go on.
jokes.setup: Kif explaining his species' reproduction
jokes.punchline: Zapp's contradiction between disgust and fascination
jokes.explanation: Perfectly economical joke showing Zapp's hypocrisy and fascination with the inappropriate

jokes.text: I held Amy's hand, and voilà!
jokes.setup: Complex scientific explanation of alien reproduction
jokes.punchline: The anticlimactic simplicity of hand-holding causing pregnancy
jokes.explanation: Brilliant subversion of expectations - innocent gesture causes pregnancy

jokes.text: Well, okay. But that better be all there is.
jokes.setup: Learning that hand-holding caused pregnancy
jokes.punchline: Amy's suspicious reaction implies she thinks there might be more
jokes.explanation: Shows Amy's lack of trust despite the innocent explanation

jokes.text: Dude, hold up. Remember when Zapp blew a hole in the ship? Indeed. Kif touched everybody there. Couldn't any one of us be the mother?
jokes.setup: Realizing the implications of Kif's reproduction method
jokes.punchline: Everyone could potentially be the 'mother'
jokes.explanation: Good logical extension of the established rules, creates new dramatic tension

jokes.text: Or even from a toilet seat. Though, that's impossible, since I have a private washroom. My home away from home.
jokes.setup: Discussing various ways pregnancy could have happened
jokes.punchline: Kif's pride in his private bathroom
jokes.explanation: Shows Kif's modest pride in small luxuries

jokes.text: By the way, Kif, your flush seems to be set on stun, not kill.
jokes.setup: Casual conversation about bathroom facilities
jokes.punchline: Star Trek phaser setting reference applied to toilet
jokes.explanation: Clever pop culture reference applied to mundane situation

jokes.text: A test! I demand a test!
jokes.setup: Discussion of potentially being the 'mother'
jokes.punchline: Zapp's dramatic demand for paternity testing
jokes.explanation: Good Zapp dramatics about avoiding parental responsibility

jokes.text: But I guess I showed myself.
jokes.setup: Professor built a machine everyone laughed at
jokes.punchline: Self-referential joke about proving himself wrong/right
jokes.explanation: Mild wordplay on 'showing' others vs. showing himself

jokes.text: Good! Fry's ejection indicates that he is not the man mama.
jokes.setup: Testing who the mother is using centrifuge
jokes.punchline: Professor's awkward phrasing 'man mama'
jokes.explanation: Mildly funny awkward phrasing for unusual situation

jokes.text: That's where I live. I have no home.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg found in the testing chamber
jokes.punchline: His pathetic admission of homelessness
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zoidberg moment of tragic comedy and homelessness

jokes.text: That explains the poster in hygiene class: 'No glove, no love.'
jokes.setup: Realizing Leela got him pregnant through ungloved touch
jokes.punchline: Misapplying safe sex slogan to alien reproduction
jokes.explanation: Clever repurposing of familiar slogan for alien biology

jokes.text: So the toilet seat is like the uncle or something?
jokes.setup: Complex explanation of alien family relationships
jokes.punchline: Fry's confused attempt to understand the family tree
jokes.explanation: Perfect Fry logic trying to make sense of absurd situation

jokes.text: Set motherhood mode.
jokes.setup: Leela accepting her role as genetic contributor
jokes.punchline: Her wrist device has a motherhood setting
jokes.explanation: Good futuristic gag about technology for every life situation

jokes.text: My face was stuck in a pizza.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg arriving late to the baby shower
jokes.punchline: His bizarre and pathetic excuse
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zoidberg absurdity and self-humiliation

jokes.text: Hey, you call her 'Grandma' now. Call me Grandma like crazy. All the time.
jokes.setup: Mrs. Wong excited about being a grandmother
jokes.punchline: Her demanding to be called Grandma excessively
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Mrs. Wong's excitement and demands

jokes.text: They are bronze.
jokes.setup: Bender giving baby booties that are 'already bronzed'
jokes.punchline: They're literally made of bronze, not bronzed for sentimentality
jokes.explanation: Good Bender cheapness disguised as sentimentality

jokes.text: You could use it for picnics.
jokes.setup: Leela gave deeply personal orphan basket as gift
jokes.punchline: Her awkward attempt to make it seem practical
jokes.explanation: Good awkward moment of Leela trying to rationalize inappropriate gift

jokes.text: We had your old party board converted now that you not be partying anymore. You trashed my party board? Damn right. Now you a mom.
jokes.setup: Mrs. Wong giving Amy an ironing board
jokes.punchline: She destroyed Amy's party board to force domestic responsibility
jokes.explanation: Good Mrs. Wong authoritarianism and forced domestication

jokes.text: The only surfing you'll do is under a big wave of responsibility.
jokes.setup: Mrs. Wong lecturing about motherhood responsibilities
jokes.punchline: Awkward surfing metaphor for adult responsibilities
jokes.explanation: Decent metaphor mixing Amy's interests with parental lecture

jokes.text: And shortly, it will rend my loins in twain... Burst forth and pull us down, down, down... Into the deep, dark waters of commitment.
jokes.setup: Kif describing the beauty of impending birth
jokes.punchline: His description becomes increasingly dark and terrifying
jokes.explanation: Great escalation from beautiful to horrifying, perfect Kif melodrama

jokes.text: When will women learn to take responsibility... For the children they've helped create?
jokes.setup: Amy abandoning pregnant Kif
jokes.punchline: Zapp's hypocritical lecture about parental responsibility
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zapp hypocrisy given his own history of avoiding responsibility

jokes.text: Hey, what's this fat, ugly thing? A frog? A toad? Or your mama?
jokes.setup: Zapp encountering alien creature
jokes.punchline: His increasingly insulting guesses culminating in 'your mama' joke
jokes.explanation: Good Zapp tactlessness and crude humor escalation

jokes.text: It's a poisonous froad! No one move.
jokes.setup: Zapp insulting what looks like a frog/toad
jokes.punchline: It's actually a dangerous 'froad' (frog-toad hybrid)
jokes.explanation: Creative portmanteau word and good setup/payoff for Zapp's rudeness

jokes.text: Smells like a jockstrap.
jokes.setup: Kif's sacred ancestral birthing grounds
jokes.punchline: Zapp's crude comparison to athletic equipment
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zapp crudeness ruining sacred moments, though fairly basic joke

jokes.text: Sorry, I'm probably just making you feel worse.
jokes.setup: Grand Midwife expressing sorrow about Amy's absence
jokes.punchline: Her casual acknowledgment that she's being unhelpful
jokes.explanation: Good deadpan acknowledgment of being counterproductive

jokes.text: Apparently Amy hasn't been working out much lately.
jokes.setup: Kif claiming he has the strength of two because Amy is in his heart
jokes.punchline: His immediate weakness suggests Amy is out of shape
jokes.explanation: Good logical joke about spiritual strength reflecting physical fitness

jokes.text: Good, 'cause I'm not changing it.
jokes.setup: Kif saying he'll try to endure the ceremony that mentions Amy frequently
jokes.punchline: Midwife's stubborn refusal to accommodate the situation
jokes.explanation: Good deadpan stubbornness in face of difficult circumstances

jokes.text: What are you looking at?
jokes.setup: Ceremony requires gazing into beloved's eyes
jokes.punchline: Kif addressing empty space where Amy should be
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment of Kif going through motions alone

jokes.text: Both.
jokes.setup: Kif asking if it's really Amy or if he's gone crazy with loneliness
jokes.punchline: Amy confirms both are true
jokes.explanation: Perfect economical punchline that acknowledges both possibilities

jokes.text: Great. Now I lost my place. I'm starting over!
jokes.setup: Amy's dramatic arrival interrupts the ceremony
jokes.punchline: Midwife's bureaucratic frustration with having to restart
jokes.explanation: Good bureaucratic inflexibility during dramatic moment

jokes.text: I live here, so I won't actually be going anywhere... But you don't have to talk to me anymore.
jokes.setup: Midwife saying she'll take her leave
jokes.punchline: Clarifying she lives there but will just ignore them
jokes.explanation: Great escalation of her antisocial nature, very economical

jokes.text: And in 20 years, they'll sprout legs and crawl back onto land as children.
jokes.setup: Watching the tadpole babies swim away
jokes.punchline: The bizarre alien life cycle timing
jokes.explanation: Good absurd alien biology that makes parenting even more surreal
